allow: Bash(node -e "const {chromium} = require\('playwright'\); \(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\({args:['--no-sandbox','--disable-setuid-sandbox']}\);const p=await b.newPage\(\);await p.goto\('http://localhost:5174/'\);await p.waitForTimeout\(2000\);await p.screenshot\({path:'/tmp/sim-login.png',fullPage:false}\);console.log\('screenshot saved'\);await b.close\(\);}\)\(\)")
